zh.Old Fold, South Mymms, Middlesex, Englan: 英國米德萊可素斯 米姆斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella Durham於1230年出生在英國米德萊可倫敦時，她的父親Thomas de Durham20歲，母親Sarah Sketchley Usher33歲。她於1259年與Henry Frowyk在英國英格蘭米德萊可結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1300年在她的家鄉享年70歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella Durham于1230年出生在英国米德萊可倫敦时，她的父亲Thomas de Durham20岁，母亲Sarah Sketchley Usher33岁。她于1259年与Henry Frowyk在英国英格兰米德萊可结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1300年在她的家乡享年70岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Durham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from the city of Durham, recorded as Dunholm in 1056 and Duram in 1297, named from Old English dūn ‘hill’ (see Down 1) + late Old English holm (from Old Norse holmr ‘island’).

variants.name: Down
meanings: English (Devon): topographic name for someone who lived on or near a down or low hill, from Middle English dun(e), doun(e) (Old English dūn) ‘down, low hill’. See also Downer .

English (Devon): possibly in some cases a patronymic from the Old English personal name Dūn, but later names of this origin cannot reliably be distinguished from those originating from the topographic sense. See Dunn 2.

variants.name: Derham
meanings: English: habitational name from Dearham in Cumbria, East and West Dereham in Norfolk, or Dyrham in Gloucestershire, named from Old English dēor ‘deer’ + hām ‘settlement, homestead’, or hamm ‘enclosed land, water meadow’.
Irish (mainly Dublin, Drogheda, and Cork): of English origin, but MacLysaght takes this to be a variant of   Durham  .

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella Durham was born in 1230, in London, Middlesex, England, her father, Thomas de Durham, was 20 and her mother, Sarah Sketchley Usher, was 33. She married Henry Frowyk in 1259, in Middlesex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1300, in her hometown, at the age of 70, and was buried in London, Middlesex, England.

fr.Church Grey Friars, London, England: Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella Durham est née en 1230, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Durham, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Sarah Sketchley Usher, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Frowyk en 1259, à Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1300, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.Church Grey Friars, London, England: Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, London, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella Durham 1230 in London, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas de Durham 20 und ihre Mutter Sarah Sketchley Usher 33. Sie hat 1259 in Middlesex, England, United Kingdom Henry Frowyk geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1300 im Alter von 70 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in London, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Durham è nata il nel 1230 nel London, Middlesex, England, sua padre, Thomas de Durham, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Sarah Sketchley Usher, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Henry Frowyk nel 1259, nel Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1300, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolta a London, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella Durhamが1230年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで生まれた時，父Thomas de Durhamは20歳，母Sarah Sketchley Usherは33歳であった。1259年にイギリスイギリスミッドレセックスでHenry Frowykと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1300年に故郷で70歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.Church Grey Friars, London, England: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 크리스트 c후르치 그리프리아르스 뉴가트
ko.lifeSummary: Isabella Durham(이)가 1230년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de Durham(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Sketchley Usher(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1259년 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스에서 Henry Frowyk(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1300년 그녀의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Durham nasceu em 1230, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Durham, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Sketchley Usher, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Frowyk em 1259, em Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1300, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos, e foi sepultada em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.Church Grey Friars, London, England: краист чурч грифрярс нюгэит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella Durham родилась в 1230 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas de Durham было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Sketchley Usher, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Frowyk в 1259 г. в местности миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1300 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabella Durham nació en 1230, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas de Durham, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Sarah Sketchley Usher, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Henry Frowyk en 1259, en Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1300, en su pueblo, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultada en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
